findings.evidence: PR lines 60-75 prove injectivity of `orbitQuotientToBase`, defined at lines 48-49 as `Quotient.lift p ...`; Mathlib has `Setoid.ker_eq_lift_of_injective` and `Setoid.lift_injective_iff_ker_eq_of_le` at `mathlib/Mathlib/Data/Setoid/Basic.lean:351` and `:358-360`.
findings.fix: Use `Setoid.lift_injective_iff_ker_eq_of_le` after proving `MulAction.orbitRel (Deck p) E = Setoid.ker p` from `eq_proj_of_orbitRel` and `hpoint`, or make this lemma private if only needed internally.
findings.issue: `orbitQuotientToBase_injective_of_exists_apply_eq` is a public specialization of the generic criterion for injectivity of a quotient lift.

summary: The main regular deck-orbit quotient equivalence is new, but one exposed helper reproves generic quotient-lift injectivity instead of using the existing Setoid API.
